creator: bg1tpt@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for your patch. Although the pear-HTTP_Session has been
superseded, it is still maintained for bugs and security fixes. So I
submitted a new port www/HTTP_Session2 instead.

On Thu, 3 Apr 2008 11:20:12 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of www/pear-HTTP_Session,
>
>  Please note that PR ports/122408 has just been submitted.
>
>  If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>  you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>  and a committer will take care of it.
>
>  The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/122408
>
>
>  --
>  Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>  edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
